language.name: English
app.title: Gmod MMD Motion Importer
dependency.pyside6_required: PySide6 is required. Install with: python -m pip install PySide6
status.language_saved: Language set to {language}. Restart the importer to refresh every existing label.
dialog.import_complete.title: Import complete
dialog.import_complete.body: The motion is ready for the MMD VMD NPC addon.
dialog.import_failed.title: Import failed
dialog.save_gma.title: Save GMod addon package
dialog.preview_failed.title: Preview failed
dialog.gmod_detection_failed.title: GMod detection failed
dialog.blender_detection_failed.title: Blender detection failed
dialog.blender_update_required.title: Blender update required
dialog.blender_update_required.body:
Detected Blender {version}. Blender 4.3 or newer is required.

Open Steam Blender page?
language.panel.title: Language
language.panel.hint: Importer UI language. The first launch follows your system language; later launches remember your selected language.
inputs.body_vmd.label: Body Motion VMD
inputs.blender.label: Blender Executable
inputs.blender.bundled: Blender {version} is bundled with the importer (reused from the Simple Character Model Importer when available) — no separate install needed.
inputs.gmod.label: Garry's Mod Install Folder
inputs.music.label: Music or Video File
inputs.music.hint: Audio is extracted and converted to MP3 for GMod
inputs.audio_offset.label: Audio offset {seconds:+.2f}s
inputs.audio_offset.hint: Optional. Adjust this while previewing; it will be saved as the motion's default in-game music offset.
inputs.audio_offset.tooltip: Default imported audio offset. Positive starts music later; negative starts music advanced.
inputs.motion_name.label: Imported Animation Name
inputs.motion_name.hint: Shown in game; Chinese/Japanese/Korean and other languages are supported. The saved file uses a safe internal ID.
inputs.motion_name.placeholder: Auto-filled from the body VMD name
inputs.motion_meta.label: Motion Metadata
inputs.motion_meta.hint: Optional. Display Name is shown in game (CJK supported); the other fields describe the dance and are read by the GMod menus. Category groups the motion when it is shipped in an addon (local imports always appear under "User Import").
inputs.meta.category.tooltip: Menu category used when this motion is shipped in an addon (e.g. "Touhou", "Vocaloid"). Local imports always show under "User Import".
inputs.meta.display_name.tooltip: Name shown in game. Auto-filled from the body VMD name; Chinese/Japanese/Korean supported. The saved file uses a safe internal ID.
inputs.meta.english_name.tooltip: Optional romanized/English title, searchable in the GMod Motion Manager.
inputs.meta.link.tooltip: Source URL (original video, motion download page, ...). Opens from the GMod Motion Manager.
inputs.meta.motion_artist.tooltip: Creator of the dance motion data.
inputs.flex_group.title: Optional Face/Flex VMDs File (If they are stored in separate VMDs from the body motion)
inputs.bake_import: Bake Motion and Install to GMod
inputs.export_addon.tooltip: Package the imported motion JSON and optional music into a distributable .gma file.
inputs.disable_foot_ik: Disable foot IK (motion baked without IK)
inputs.disable_foot_ik.tooltip: Turn off every IK constraint on the model (feet and toes) before baking. Use for motions authored without foot IK — baking those with IK enabled pins the legs to the rest pose. Leave off for normal motions.
inputs.progress.title: Bake Progress
inputs.log_output.title: Import Log and Output
preview.link_hint: Preview animation is what will be linked and played in game.
preview.audio_offset.tooltip: Preview and default imported audio offset. Positive starts music later; negative starts music advanced.
preview.audio_offset_hint: Adjust the audio offset in preview when possible; the current offset will be recorded when animation baking finishes. Positive offset delays music.
log.preview_loaded: Preview loaded: {model}, {bones} bones, {flex_tracks} flex tracks, {textures} texture files
log.timing_sample: Recorded timing sample: {frames} frames in {elapsed}. Future estimate model: time = {slope:.4f} * frames + {intercept:.1f}s ({samples} sample(s)).
error.select_body_vmd: Select an existing .vmd motion file first
error.select_gma_output: Select where to save the GMod addon .gma file
progress.complete_detail: Import complete. Motion JSON and optional music were written to Garry's Mod.
progress.failed_detail: Import failed. See the log for the detailed error.
estimate.default_no_vmd: default estimate; no body VMD selected
estimate.default_parse_error: default estimate after VMD parsing error
estimate.learned_model: learned estimate from {samples} import(s): time = {slope:.4f} * frames + {intercept:.1f}s
estimate.parse_error_log: Could not estimate bake time from VMD: {error}
inputs.camera_vmd.label: Camera VMD (optional)
inputs.camera_vmd.hint: MMD camera motion; exports a camera path the GMod addon can play.
preview.follow_camera.tooltip: When a camera VMD is set, the preview looks through the MMD camera.
manager.hint: Motions installed in your Garry's Mod. Select a row to rename, remove, or reveal its files.
manager.col.name: Name
manager.status_idle: Open this tab to scan installed motions.
manager.status_no_dir: No Garry's Mod motions folder found. Set the GMod path on the Inputs tab.
manager.rename_prompt: New in-game name (the internal file ID is kept):
manager.remove_confirm:
Delete {count} motion(s) and their music from Garry's Mod?

{names}
manager.remove_failed_title: Some motions could not be removed
